meta.title: Invoice Dispute Resolver — Get paid with AI-powered demand letters
meta.description: Client hasn't paid your invoice? Automatically generate professional dispute and pre-litigation letters from your PDF invoices in 30 seconds.

hero.title_2: Get a professional dispute letter in 30 seconds.
hero.description: Stop wasting nerves on arguments and money on lawyers. Your client will think you have an in-house legal team. Upload your PDF invoice, select a tone, and let AI do the work.

problem.title: Why freelancers lose up to 15% of their hard-earned income?
problem.p1_desc: A single hour of a lawyer's time costs more than the disputed invoice itself. You end up giving up.
problem.p2_desc: Bad clients drag out payments because they know you lack the resources to send formal, scary legal demands.
problem.p3_desc: Instead of focusing on new paid projects, you spend nights drafting angry, ineffective emails.

features.title: How Invoice Dispute Resolver works
features.step1_desc: Drag & drop your PDF invoice. Our system automatically extracts amounts, dates, and names.
features.step2_desc: Select the mood: friendly reminder, strict business tone, or firm legal demand.
features.step3_desc: Copy the text or send it directly from the platform. Get notified the moment they open it.

testimonials.title: We've helped recover over $120,000 in delayed payments
testimonials.t1_text: "The client ignored me for 3 months. I generated a strict legal letter here, hit send, and got paid the very next day!"
testimonials.t2_text: "Phenomenal tool. The email tracking feature is a game-changer. I know exactly when the client opens the claim, so they can't pretend they missed it."

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: The AI generates professional pre-litigation notices and demands based on international business standards. They show clients you're professional and ready to escalate.
faq.a2: Completely. All uploaded invoices are heavily encrypted and securely stored using Supabase Storage. Your data is private and fully safe.
faq.q3: How does the free plan work?
faq.a3: You get 3 document generations per month entirely free. No credit card required, no hidden catches.

cta_bottom.title: Get paid what you are owed today
cta_bottom.desc: Join hundreds of business owners who stopped working for free and took control of their cash flow.

footer.rights: © 2026 Invoice Dispute Resolver. All rights reserved.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content: At Invoice Dispute Resolver, we respect your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data when you use our service.

sections.title: 2. Data We Collect
sections.content: We collect: (a) Personal Information: name and email upon registration; (b) Document Data: PDF invoice files, metadata, and extracted text; (c) Technical Data: IP address, browser type, and access logs to ensure platform stability.

sections.title: 3. How we use your data
sections.content: The data is used exclusively for: (1) Providing AI-generated claims services; (2) Improving text analysis algorithms; (3) Sending important notifications about your account status or service updates.

sections.title: 4. Security and storage
sections.content: All data is stored on Supabase's secure servers using AES-256 encryption standards. We do not sell your data to third parties. You have the right to delete your account and all uploaded documents at any time through your profile settings.

sections.title: 5. Use of AI (Gemini API)
sections.content: We use the Gemini 2.0 Flash model through the official API. According to Google policy, data sent through the API is not used to further train general Google models unless the user allows it.

sections.title: 6. Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies to support the authorization session and analytics (Google Analytics). You can disable them in your browser settings, but this may limit the functionality of the service.

sections.title: 7. Contacts
sections.content: If you have any questions about this policy, please contact us by email: support@invoicedispute.com.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By using Invoice Dispute Resolver, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms. If you are acting on behalf of a company, you warrant that you have the appropriate authority to do so.

sections.title: 2. Service Description and Disclaimer
sections.content: We provide a platform for generating business letter templates. We are NOT a law firm, attorneys, or legal representatives. The generated documents are only drafts for guidance. We do not guarantee the outcome of a dispute and are not responsible for actions taken based on our advice.

sections.title: 3. Terms of Use
sections.content: You may not use the service to: (a) create fraudulent or defamatory emails; (b) attempt to hack or interfere with the platform infrastructure; (c) send mass spam via our API.

sections.title: 4. Payments and Cancellations
sections.content: Subscriptions are charged on a monthly or annual basis in advance. You can cancel your subscription at any time through the control panel. After cancellation, you retain access to the features until the end of the current billing period. Refunds for unused periods are made in accordance with our internal refund policy.

sections.title: 5. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All site content, design, logos and program code belong to the owners of Invoice Dispute Resolver. You receive a limited, non-exclusive license to use the generated documents for your own business needs.

sections.title: 6. Change of Terms
sections.content: We reserve the right to make changes to these Terms at any time. We will try to notify users of significant updates by email.

sections.title: 7. Jurisdiction and Disputes
sections.content: Any disputes arising from these Terms shall be resolved through negotiations. In the event of failure to reach an agreement, in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which the company is registered.
